mapper.select: SELECT report_id, year_month, metrics_json::text as metrics_json, llm_summary_text, llm_model, created_at, user_id, is_current_month FROM projectdb.monthly_reports WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY year_month DESC

SELECT report_id, year_month, metrics_json::text as metrics_json, llm_summary_text, llm_model, created_at, user_id, is_current_month FROM projectdb.monthly_reports WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND year_month = #{yearMonth}

SELECT report_id, year_month, metrics_json::text as metrics_json, llm_summary_text, llm_model, created_at, user_id, is_current_month FROM projectdb.monthly_reports WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_current_month = true ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO projectdb.monthly_reports ( year_month, metrics_json, llm_summary_text, llm_model, user_id, is_current_month ) VALUES ( #{yearMonth}, #{metricsJson}::jsonb, #{llmSummaryText}, #{llmModel}, #{userId}, #{isCurrentMonth} )
mapper.update: UPDATE projectdb.monthly_reports SET is_current_month = false WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_current_month = true
